settings.sign_out_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to sign out?
settings.delete_confirm_message:
This will permanently delete your account after a 30-day grace period. You can cancel anytime during this period.

What will be deleted:
• Your profile and account
• All chat history with Rex
• Your progress and XP
• Subscription information

Are you sure?

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.sign_in_failed: Sign in failed. Check your credentials.
errors.sign_up_failed: Sign up failed. Please try again.

auth.sign_in_subtitle: Pick up where you left off.
auth.no_account: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.have_account: Already have an account? Sign in

rex.fallback_checkin_success: Solid. You showed up. That's the whole game — just keep showing up.
rex.fallback_checkin_fail: Missed today. Fine. The streak doesn't define you — what you do tomorrow does.
rex.fallback_streak_warning: Your streak is on the line. Don't let a lazy evening undo a good week.
rex.fallback_weekly_summary: Another week in the books. You're building something real here — don't stop now.

notifications.morning_body: Start your day strong. Your lesson is waiting.
notifications.afternoon_body: Don't forget your daily lesson. 5 minutes is all it takes.
notifications.evening_body: End the day right. Complete your lesson before midnight.
notifications.streak_risk_body: You haven't checked in today. Don't break the chain.

aiNotice.title: Meet Rex: Your AI Coach
aiNotice.subtitle: Before we begin, here's what you should know:

canDo.title: What Rex Can Do
canDo.remember: Remember your past conversations and progress
canDo.reflect: Help you reflect on your goals and challenges

cannotDo.title: What Rex Cannot Do
cannotDo.replace: Replace professional therapy or medical advice
cannotDo.guarantee: Guarantee accurate responses in all situations
cannotDo.understand: Understand complex emotional nuances like a human

privacy.title: Your Privacy
privacy.description: Your conversations with Rex are stored securely to personalize your experience. See our Privacy Policy for details.

crisis.title: In Crisis?
crisis.description: If you're in distress, please contact emergency services or a crisis helpline. Rex is not equipped for emergency situations.

aiNotice.acknowledgment: By continuing, you acknowledge that you understand Rex is an AI system with limitations.

crisisDisclaimer.title: IMPORTANT: Growthovo is not an emergency service
crisisDisclaimer.description: If you are in immediate danger or experiencing a mental health emergency:
crisisDisclaimer.footer: Rex can provide support, but cannot replace professional help in a crisis.

ageVerification.label: I confirm that I am at least 13 years old
ageVerification.description: Growthovo requires users to be at least 13 years of age. If you are under 13, please do not use this app. If you are between 13 and 18, please ensure you have parental permission to use Growthovo.
ageVerification.learnMore: Why do we have age restrictions?

pricing.title: Pricing and Billing
pricing.description: Prices include applicable VAT. Billed through Stripe payment processing.

autoRenewal.title: Auto-Renewal
autoRenewal.description: Your subscription automatically renews at the end of each billing period unless cancelled at least 24 hours before renewal. You will be charged the then-current subscription price.

cancellation.title: Cancellation
cancellation.access: Access continues until end of current billing period

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.guarantee: 14-day money-back guarantee for first-time subscribers (EU consumer right)
refund.period: Request refunds within 14 days of initial purchase

features.title: What You Get
features.unlimited: Unlimited access to Rex AI coach

payment.title: Payment Processing
payment.description: Payments are securely processed by Stripe. Growthovo does not store your payment card details.

questions.title: Questions?
questions.description: Contact support@growthovo.app or visit our Help Center.

cookieConsent.title: Cookie and Tracking Notice
cookieConsent.description: Growthovo uses cookies and similar technologies to provide and improve our service.

essential.title: Essential Cookies (Always Active)
essential.description: Authentication, security, preferences, and core app functionality

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies (Optional)
analytics.description: Understand app usage, identify bugs, and improve user experience

cookieConsent.viewPolicy: View our Privacy Policy for more information

viewer.loadError: Failed to load document. Please try again.
viewer.fallbackNotice: This document is not available in your language. English version is displayed.

documents.title: Legal Documents
documents.subtitle: View our legal policies and terms
documents.footer: These documents outline your rights and our responsibilities. If you have questions, contact us at privacy@growthovo.app

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.description: How we collect, use, and protect your personal data

termsConditions.title: Terms & Conditions
termsConditions.description: Your rights and responsibilities when using Growthovo

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.description: How we use cookies and tracking technologies

updateNotification.title: Legal Documents Updated
updateNotification.subtitleRequired: We've updated our legal documents. Please review and acknowledge the changes to continue using Growthovo.
updateNotification.subtitleOptional: We've updated our legal documents. Please review the changes when you have a moment.
updateNotification.requirementNotice: You must acknowledge the Terms & Conditions update to continue using Growthovo.
